description_long: This muffin features a rounded, irregularly textured base with a golden-brown baked appearance, topped with a thick layer of chocolate that drips unevenly down the sides. Atop the chocolate sits a large, cylindrical white marshmallow, slightly browned on its upper surface, giving the muffin a playful and indulgent look. The chocolate appears glossy and thick, contrasting with the matte, soft texture of the muffin base. There is no visible wrapper, exposing the muffin's craggy, baked exterior. The overall form is compact and dense, with the marshmallow topping providing a striking visual accent. The muffin is shown isolated against a plain white background, with no additional decorative elements or placement context.
description: A golden-brown muffin with a thick chocolate coating and a large white marshmallow on top, featuring a rugged, baked texture and no visible wrapper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muffin's rounded base, thick chocolate layer, and a prominent marshmallow topping centered on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the slanted marshmallow and the way chocolate drips unevenly over the muffin's surface.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the smooth chocolate coverage and the muffin's irregular, craggy base.
description_view_3: Angled view displays the marshmallow's browned top and the glossy chocolate drips, with more of the muffin's base visible.
